ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlook condition */,
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the temperature condition */,
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the humidity condition */,
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind condition */,
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the decision made based on the weather conditions */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the weather record was recorded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the weather record was recorded */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Range of precipitation for the weather condition */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Range of cloud cover for the weather condition */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the weather record is linked to */,
  "probability_score" REAL /* Probability score indicating the likelihood of the activity being enjoyable */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the weather conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_wind_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_id") REFERENCES winds ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_outlook_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlook_id") REFERENCES outlooks ("outlook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_humidity_id FOREIGN KEY ("humidity_id") REFERENCES humidities ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_decision_id FOREIGN KEY ("decision_id") REFERENCES decisions ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_records_temp_id FOREIGN KEY ("temp_id") REFERENCES temperatures ("temp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlooks" (
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlook condition */,
  "outlook_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlook condition (e.g., Sunny, Overcast, Rain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outlook condition */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image representing the outlook condition */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the outlook condition (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature condition */,
  "temp_name" TEXT /* Name of the temperature condition (e.g., Hot, Mild, Cool) */,
  "temp_range" TEXT /* Range of temperatures for the condition */,
  "comfort_level" TEXT /* Comfort level of the temperature condition (e.g., Uncomfortable, Comfortable, Very Comfortable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidities" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity condition */,
  "humidity_name" TEXT /* Name of the humidity condition (e.g., High, Normal) */,
  "humidity_range" TEXT /* Range of humidity for the condition */,
  "comfort_level" TEXT /* Comfort level of the humidity condition (e.g., Uncomfortable, Comfortable, Very Comfortable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winds" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind condition */,
  "wind_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind condition (e.g., Weak, Strong) */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Range of wind speeds for the condition */,
  "gust_speed" TEXT /* Range of gust speeds for the wind condition */,
  "comfort_level" TEXT /* Comfort level of the wind condition (e.g., Uncomfortable, Comfortable, Very Comfortable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "decision_name" TEXT /* Name of the decision (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the decision */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision (e.g., Too hot, Perfect conditions) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the preference */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the preference is for */,
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred outlook condition */,
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred temperature condition */,
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred humidity condition */,
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred wind condition */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Score indicating the user's preference for the weather conditions */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Event Planner, Manager, Administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_preferences_humidity_id FOREIGN KEY ("humidity_id") REFERENCES humidities ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_preferences_outlook_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlook_id") REFERENCES outlooks ("outlook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_preferences_wind_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_id") REFERENCES winds ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_preferences_temp_id FOREIGN KEY ("temp_id") REFERENCES temperatures ("temp_id")
)
